title: Human Colon Tissue Dissociation for Immune Cells
author: Kylie James
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.tbfeijn

steps.title: In a petri dish with the...
steps.instruction: In a petri dish with the collection media, cut tissue into small pieces with surgical scissors. Transfer tissue pieces to a 50ml falcon containing 10ml PBS/ HEPES and gently agitate.

steps.title: Add 10ml of RPMI/HEPES/EDTA
steps.instruction: Add 10ml of RPMI/HEPES/EDTA. Incubate in shaker incubate for 20 min (37C, ~200rpm)

steps.title: Vortex and aspirate S/N
steps.instruction: Vortex and aspirate S/N.

steps.title: Wash pieces in a petri dish with >10ml PBS/HEPES
steps.instruction: Wash pieces in a petri dish with >10ml PBS/HEPES.

steps.title: Using forceps, transfer the pieces to...
steps.instruction: Using forceps, transfer the pieces to a fresh 50ml falcon tube containing 8ml RPMI/HEPES/Enzymes. Incubate for 30minutes at 37C, with shaking (~200 rpm).

steps.title: Vortex, pass through a 100um yellow...
steps.instruction: Vortex, pass through a 100um yellow cell strainer on top of a fresh 50ml tube. Use the end of a 5ml syringe plunger to break up the remaining tissue through the strainer. Wash through with 10ml 2%FBS/PBS

steps.title: Pellet cells by centrifuging for 10...
steps.instruction: Pellet cells by centrifuging for 10 minutes at 1200rpm and remove S/N. Resuspend in 5ml P-40 and transfer to a 15ml Falcon tube.

steps.title: Gently underlay (using a 1ml pipette)...
steps.instruction: Gently underlay (using a 1ml pipette) with 3 ml P-80 percol

steps.title: Spin for 20 minutes at 600xg...
steps.instruction: Spin for 20 minutes at 600xg (10C) with no acceleration and break.

steps.title: Collect cells at the interface using...
steps.instruction: Collect cells at the interface using a plastic Pasteur pipette or 1ml pipette into a new 15ml tube. Top up to 10ml with 2%FBS/PBS, centrifuge for 7min and remove s/n.

steps.title: Add 100ul of antibody cocktail (below)...
steps.instruction: Add 100ul of antibody cocktail (below) made in 2%FBS/PBS (or BD Brilliant Violet Staining Buffer if using more than 2 BV conjugated antibodies) directly to the samples. Mix well.

steps.title: Incubate at room temp for 20mins
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temp for 20mins.

steps.title: Move to a FACS tube and...
steps.instruction: Move to a FACS tube and using FACS buffer, wash out tube to collect as many cells as possible. Top up FACS tube to 2ml.

steps.title: Spin for 5minutes and remove s/n
steps.instruction: Spin for 5minutes and remove s/n.

steps.title: To 500ul 2%FBS/PBS buffer, add
steps.instruction: To 500ul 2%FBS/PBS buffer, add: %s %s Aim to sort 50000 of target cells into 500ml 2%FBS/PBS in eppendorfs.

steps.title: 200ml PBS/HEPES
steps.instruction: 200ml PBS/HEPES: PBS (198ml) + 10mM HEPES (2ml) 200ml RPMI/HEPES*: RPMI (196ml) + 2%FBS (4ml) + 10mM HEPES (2ml) 120ml RPMI/HEPES/EDTA: RPMI/HEPES* (117.6ml) + 1 mM DTT (1.2ml)+ 5mM EDTA(1.2ml) 50ml RPMI/HEPES/Enzymes- RPMI/HEPES* ( 44.23ml) DNase (~60ug/ml; 1.57ml) + Liberase (0.42 mg/ml;4.2ml) 100ml 2%FBS/PBS (FACS buffer): PBS (98ml) + FBS (2ml) Percol gradients: 30ml P-100 = 9 volumes Percoll (27ml) + 1 volume 10 x PBS (3ml) 30ml P-40 = 4 volumes of P-100 (12ml) + 6 volumes of PRMI (18ml) 18ml P-80 = 8 volumes of P-100 (14.4ml) + 2 volumes of PBS (5.4ml) Notes on enzymes: Liberase - comes as 2 x 5mg stock. dilute in sterile water to give 5mg/ml stock (use 673 ul per 8ml digestion cocktail) DNase1 – (1550 KU size) – dilute in sterile water to give 4 KU/ml (use 252 ul per 8ml digestion cocktail).

steps.title: Poor tissue into a petri tissue
steps.instruction: Poor tissue into a petri tissue. Transfer pieces into a new 50ml Falcon tube.

steps.title: Repeat step 4-5
steps.instruction: Repeat step 4-5.

steps.title: After sort and back in the...
steps.instruction: After sort and back in the lab, pallet cells and resupend in 50ul PBS. Manually count 10ul cells diluted 1:1 in trypan blue to confirm cell number (we see that the FACS sorter over estimates the number of sorted cells by about 50%).

steps.title: Resuspend at 1000cells/ul in PBS and...
steps.instruction: Resuspend at 1000cells/ul in PBS and aim to capture 5000 cells in the 10X chip.
